ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of products ordered */,
  "ordered_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped) */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_length" REAL /* Length of the product */,
  "product_width" REAL /* Width of the product */,
  "product_height" REAL /* Height of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with this status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was created */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier handling the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* Tracking URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with this payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the cart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cart was created */,
  "cart_status" TEXT /* Status of the cart (e.g., active, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated shopping cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item in the cart (e.g., added, removed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wishlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the wishlist was created */,
  "wishlist_status" TEXT /* Status of the wishlist (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlist_items" (
  "wishlist_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist item */,
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_items_wishlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("wishlist_id") REFERENCES wishlists ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the payment method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the payment method (e.g., last four digits, email) */,
  "payment_method_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment method (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
